human_value_tasks: HR executives handle sensitive employee situations — grievances, disciplinary proceedings, personal hardships — requiring empathy, confidentiality, and human judgement AI cannot exercise. ai_exposure_detail: Fetcher AI and HiredScore automate resume screening, candidate ranking, and passive talent shortlisting, dramatically reducing sourcing cycle time. ChatGPT generates compelling job descriptions, InMail outreach messages, and rejection communication at scale. AI tools within LinkedIn Recruiter and ATS platforms provide match scores, diversity insights, and pipeline forecasting.
human_value_tasks: Recruitment specialists build authentic candidate relationships, represent the employer brand in every interaction, and make holistic hiring judgements that go beyond resume matching — skills AI cannot fully replicate. They assess cultural fit, motivation, and long-term potential during interviews, which requires human intuition and experience. Candidate experience, especially in competitive talent markets, depends on the warmth and responsiveness of the recruiter.
